member.name: split
member.arglist: (const Path &dir, const Settings &sets, const AllowFilePred &allow_path_pred=default_is_allowed_path) -> std::vector< ArchiveData >

member.name: write
member.arglist: (bool compressed, ArchiveData &&data, const Path &root) -> std::vector< std::pair< Path, std::string >>

member.name: find_archive_name
member.arglist: (std::span< const FilePath > plugins, const Settings &sets, ArchiveType type) -> FilePath

member.name: list_helper
member.arglist: (It begin, It end, const Settings &sets, FileTypes type) -> std::vector< FilePath >

member.name: list_plugins
member.arglist: (It begin, It end, const Settings &sets) -> std::vector< FilePath >

member.name: list_archive
member.arglist: (It begin, It end, const Settings &sets) -> std::vector< FilePath >

member.type: requires std::bidirectional_iterator< It > &&std::invocable< Predicate, ValueType > &&std::invocable< Sum, ValueType, ValueType > auto
member.name: merge_if
member.arglist: (It first, It last, const Predicate &predicate, const Sum &sum) -> It

member.type: requires std::ranges::input_range< Range > &&invocable_l_or_r< Func, std::ranges::range_value_t< Range > > auto
member.name: for_each_mt
str_compare
member.arglist: (std::u8string_view lhs, std::u8string_view rhs, bool case_sensitive=true) -> bool

member.name: str_find
member.arglist: (std::u8string_view string, std::u8string_view snippet, bool case_sensitive=true) -> size_t

member.name: str_contain
member.arglist: (std::u8string_view string, std::u8string_view snippet, bool case_sensitive=true) -> bool

member.name: str_match
member.arglist: (std::u8string_view string, std::u8string_view pattern, bool case_sensitive=true, Cards cards=default_cards) -> bool

member.name: load
member.arglist: (Path path, AnimExe exe) noexcept -> tl::expected< Anim, Error >

member.name: convert
member.arglist: (Mesh file, bool headpart, btu::Game game) -> tl::expected< Mesh, Error >

member.name: optimize
member.arglist: (Mesh file, const OptimizationSteps &steps) -> tl::expected< Mesh, Error >

member.name: sanitize_dimensions
member.arglist: (Dimension dim, uint8_t ratio_threshold=3, uint8_t pow2_threshold=3) noexcept -> Dimension

member.name: error_from_hresult
member.arglist: (int64_t hr, std::error_code default_err=TextureErr::Unknown, SourceLocation loc=BETHUTIL_CURRENT_SOURCE_LOC) -> Error

member.name: guess_best_format
member.arglist: (const Texture &tex, BestFormatFor formats, bool force_uncompressed=false) noexcept -> DXGI_FORMAT

member.name: get_filetype
member.arglist: (const Path &filepath, const Path &root, const Settings &sets) -> FileTypes

member.type: constexpr std::invoke_result_t< Fn const &, CallArgs..., Args const &... >
member.name: operator()
member.arglist: (CallArgs &&...cargs) const &noexcept(std::is_nothrow_invocable_v< Fn const &, CallArgs..., Args const &... >)

member.name: equivalent
member.arglist: (const std::error_code &ec, int cond) const noexcept -> bool override

member.name: FilePath
member.arglist: (Path dir, std::u8string name, std::u8string suffix, std::u8string ext, FileTypes type)

member.name: make
member.arglist: (const Path &path, const Settings &sets, FileTypes type) -> std::optional< FilePath >
